name: HWR_SRVY_SUMMARY
description: This table will be used to store main information of the survey.

columns.Name: SURVEY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Survey Id identifying the Survey entry in this table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONS
columns.Comments: This is a comma separated list of Questions associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the FUSION id of the owner of the Survey.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber ID associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber Code associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: PARTICPANT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of participants in the survey being idetntified in this record.

columns.Name: PARTICPANT_COMPLETION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of participants who have completed this survey.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Survey Start Date. In the first run, we are defaulting it to the creation time.

columns.Name: EXPIIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Survey Expiration Date. In the first run, we are defaulting it to the start date+ 3 weeks.

columns.Name: ADVANCE_FLAG
columns.Comments: ADVANCE FLAG for this survey. Not used in the first run.

columns.Name: ANALYZED
columns.Comments: This value identifies whether this survey was analyzed or not.

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Meeting ID associated with the survey, if this survey is part of meeting project.

columns.Name: IS_DELETED
columns.Comments: This indicates if the survey is disabled or not. 0 --> not disabled;   1 --> disabled.   A survey is disabled if its been deleted.

columns.Name: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_2.  This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
